name: Playtest 22: Fortress of Earth
description:
TESTS: Wall of Stone wall creation (concentration-linked), Mold Earth terrain removal (non-concentration), Transmute Rock pit creation (concentration-linked), occupied hex skipping for wall/pit terrain, concentration break reverts terrain, terrain modification visual effects, AI terrain spells (enemy Mage with Wall of Stone), non-concentration terrain persists through cleanup, stacking terrain from different sources, Spike Growth combo (zone + terrain modification).

Gareth Stoneheart and Ser Marcus defend a mountain pass against a Mage and hobgoblin soldiers. Gareth uses Wall of Stone to block chokepoints and Transmute Rock to create hazardous pits, while the enemy Mage also has Wall of Stone for AI-controlled terrain creation. Mold Earth allows clearing terrain modifications. The grid features existing terrain (cover, difficult) to test interaction with dynamic modifications.
